data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the geofencing requirement.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the geofencing feature, specifically that users must be within a certain distance of the job site to clock in. However, the evidence provided does not include any API reads or checks that confirm the existence or functionality of this geofencing feature. As a result, it is not possible to determine if the requirement is satisfied or if there is a gap.
gaps: No evidence of geofencing functionality to validate the requirement.
